70010000121199.name: Nitro City Racing

70010000123052.description:
Solve math-based puzzles as you jump from platform to platform in a colorful world made of numbers and geometrical shapes. Join Nero and Sci on their adventure, solo or with a friend, and travel across 4 unique worlds, designed to stimulate logical and mathematical thinking.

Jump, think, solve, and explore the world of Héméide
- 36 levels across 4 distinct worlds
- Choose between solo or local multiplayer: play as either Néro or Sci
- Over 20 hours of gameplay with high replayability

A fun workout for the brain
- Gameplay mechanics recommended by the Institute for Research on Mathematics Education (IREM Lyon)
- Progressive difficulty and hint system designed for players aged 13+
- A walkthrough guide of the game's puzzle is available on our Discord server, so you don't feel stuck!
70010000123052.intro: Jump, think, experiment, and work your brain out in our vibrant math puzzle-platformer!
70010000123052.name: Néro & Sci ∫ Integral Edition

70010000106162.description:
With over 1.5 million copies sold worldwide, the legendary zombie-hunting action game LOLLIPOP CHAINSAW finally returns in a remastered edition!

Using the nimble moves she honed through cheerleading and wielding a massive chainsaw, Juliet slices through hordes of zombies in exhilarating, over-the-top action!
The Chain Hit Hunting system increases chainsaw attack speed as your combo count rises, while the newly added Chainsaw Blaster with auto-fire cranks up the thrill even further!
With improved playability, dazzling visual effects, and brand-new background music, there’s plenty to enjoy.

Enhanced graphics, a newly added difficulty mode, and numerous other improvements bring the game to a whole new level. This isn’t just a nostalgic revival—it’s a fully refined rebirth of Lollipop Chainsaw in every way!
Introducing LOLLIPOP CHAINSAW RePOP!

＜Story＞
Juliet attends the massive San Romero High School in the American West. She’s an ordinary high school girl who loves cheerleading more than anything.

Right now, she has two worries.
First, she’s gained some weight thanks to her favourite lollipops.
Second, she’s trying to figure out how to tell her new boyfriend Nick that she’s actually a zombie hunter.

And that’s no easy task… because zombie hunters send the undead off to heaven. Not exactly the sort of job a young lady casually brings up!

One morning, as Juliet pedals furiously to meet Nick—already running late—a horde of zombies suddenly appears before her.
As fate would have it, that day is also her 18th birthday. With her birthday ruined, Juliet grabs a chainsaw from her bag and charges into the school, now overrun with zombies, in search of her beloved Nick!
70010000106162.intro: The cute and sexy zombie hunter Juliet goes wild again on Nintendo Switch™ 2!
70010000106162.name: LOLLIPOP CHAINSAW RePOP Nintendo Switch™ 2 Edition

70010000111301.description:
Travel with Judero through a handcrafted landscape as he discovers there is an evil at work manipulating the unguarded.

Strike and dodge your way through a myriad of foes culminating in exciting and unique boss challenges.

Take on the form of lesser creatures to greatly expand your abilities. Use these enchanted minions in combat and to solve puzzles.

Discover the world of Judero through branching dialogues and pithy, aphoristic NPCs.

Through your adventures you will encounter a number of diverse Mini Games with differing mechanics and visual styles. Mini games also vary the pace of the game and allow us to explore other narrative tangents.

There are many secrets and discoveries to find as you roam through the world of Judero. From collectables and pick-ups to whole optional story-lines and more.

Judero is made from handcrafted objects and bespoke figurines, animated in the stop-motion tradition. For us, this art style invokes something nostalgic; in part comical but perhaps a little bit creepy too. These real life elements are then rendered into a 3D world to evoke a unique visual style. Using this style we can bring in digital techniques like real-time lighting, shaders and post-processing effects. Cutscenes will be made using traditional stop-motion animation techniques with greater fidelity to give a more cinematic quality.

The music in Judero is an homage to traditional British folk music such as those documented by Francis James Child. Many of these songs are hundreds of years old and it has been an honour researching and learning them. We are keeping instrumentation acoustic and mostly authentic to the originals (mostly) but with contemporary arrangements and harmonies.
70010000111301.intro: Judero is a handmade action/ adventure game inspired by the rich folk history of the Scottish Borders. You play as Judero, a Celt who can establish a rapport with the nature around him.
70010000111301.name: Judero

70010000112641.description:
Explore Bluey’s World of Play!

Join everyone's favorite blue heeler with a new story by the show's creator in Bluey's Quest for The Gold Pen.

When Dad snatches the Gold Pen Bluey needs to finish her drawing, Bluey and her family are swept into a world of fun and adventure. Explore charming, hand-drawn worlds, uncover hidden treasures, and solve playful puzzles as you help bring the Gold Pen home.

Written by Joe Brumm, this original story features fully-animated cutscenes and exploration-focused gameplay, designed to be enjoyed by fans of all ages. 

Key Features:

An Original Bluey Story. Written by Bluey creator, Joe Brumm, this adventure captures the warmth, humor, and heart of the beloved series.

A World Drawn from Play. Explore nine charming, hand-drawn worlds — from golden beaches and snowy mountains to the iconic Australian Outback and beyond.

Wild Rides & Playful Exploration. Travel by boat, bike, jetpack, and glider on a fun-filled quest.

Fun Challenges & Playful Puzzles. Help Bluey and Bingoose outwit pesky cane toads, sleepy council workers, and naughty bin chickens by finding clues, solving puzzles, and uncovering hidden treasures.

Fully-Animated Story Moments. Expressive cutscenes bring Bluey’s world and adventures to life. 

An Experience for the Whole Family. Easy-to-learn controls make this adventure fun to watch, share, and take turns playing.
70010000112641.intro: Join Bluey in a heartfelt, story-driven adventure. Explore hand-drawn worlds and enjoy an original family-friendly story written by Bluey creator, Joe Brumm.
70010000112641.name: Bluey's Quest For The Gold Pen

70010000112996.description:
Night Swarm is a vampire-themed roguelite RPG bullet hell where you play as a fearsome young vampire lord rising to power. Gather loyal allies, unleash devastating abilities, and fight back against the relentless werewolf hordes that threaten to consume the night.

BUILD YOUR SWARM. TEAR THROUGH THE PACK.
Ancient powers of the dark stand behind you, each offering unique, cursed blessings to aid your ascent.
Uncover why these shadowy forces have chosen to support you, unravel the truth behind the age-old war between vampires and werewolves, and delve into the haunted pasts of your companions as you push deeper into the cursed lands.
The night is yours—and you are hungry.

GROW STRONG — AND MAKE OTHERS STRONGER
Let your legend travel faster than your shadow, becoming a beacon of hope for those still resisting in the dark.
They await a new Vampire Lord—a leader worthy of the night. That leader is you.
Rally them to your side. Show them how to fight. And remind the world that the true terror of the night... is you.

YOU HAVE WORK TO DO TONIGHT
Aid friendly creatures, uncover hidden treasures, restore the natural order, and bring balance back to the night.
Sometimes you'll help your allies. Sometimes—even your enemies. Because to truly reclaim the night, it's not enough to defeat your foes; you must also ensure your friends rise with you.
By guiding others to victory, you earn their trust—and their aid in your fight against ancient evils. The night is a delicate web of power, and only those who understand its balance can hope to survive it.
70010000112996.intro: Vampiric roguelite RPG where you rise and battle werewolf hordes.
70010000112996.name: Night Swarm

70010000113488.description:
Challenge a friend to a tennis match where you can play as SpongeBob, Aang, and all your Nickelodeon favorites in fast-paced, local split-screen action!

All-Star Nickelodeon Characters: Pick your star player from among 15 iconic Nickelodeon characters from SpongeBob SquarePants, Avatar: The Last Airbender, Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles and more!

Play It Your Style: Choose from over 500 outfits and accessories to customize your Nickelodeon character your way, and show off your personality on the tennis court. Turn the tide of the match with powerful ultimate abilities that are unique to every character!


Play Solo or Local 1v1: Challenge a friend or family member to a 1v1 couch co-op split-screen tennis match, or play in Story Mode at your own speed!

Instant Fun for Everyone: You don't need to be a pro to have fun! Start playing instantly with easy-to-learn controls, accessible for the entire family.

Multiple Ways to Play: From classic matches to fun mini-games, there's something for everyone. Embark on a narrated Story Mode, dive into Mini-Games for extra fun, or rise to the top in Tournament Mode to claim your victory!
70010000113488.intro: Hit the tennis court for some fast-paced arcade action as your favorite Nickelodeon all-star! Customize SpongeBob, Aang, Garfield and more legendary characters!
70010000113488.name: Nickelodeon Extreme Tennis: Next!

70010000114347.description:
The world of the Wall awaits. Wall World 2 builds on the mining rogue-lite experience with expanded mechanics, new challenges, and deeper gameplay. Explore procedurally generated mines full of new discoveries and dangers. Extract valuable resources, harness lost technologies, and upgrade your robospider and exosuit to survive against hordes of raging monsters. Venture through incredible biomes and uncover the secrets entombed in the depths of the Wall.

DELVE INTO THE MYSTERIES OF THE WALL
Venture deep into the World Wall in your robospider. The mysterious Hole holds both deadly threats and long-lost answers. Risk everything to find out what lies on the other side of the unseen depths.

BATTLE ON ALL FRONTS
Monsters lurk everywhere — not only on the surface of the Wall, but also within its mines. Arm yourself with an arsenal of powerful weapons and abilities to fight off any threat that stands between you and the truth.

ADAPT TO A LIVING WORLD
The endless Wall is ever-changing. Its depths contain not only resources and technologies, but also anomalies that can help or hinder your journey. Navigate incredible biomes, overcome obstacles and discover new wonders as you carve your path deeper inside.

UPGRADE AND CUSTOMIZE
Customize your robospider between expeditions and meet new characters in the sphere city. You'll have plenty of options to upgrade and enhance the equipment of both your exosuit and your mobile battle station. Each of them brings you one step closer to conquering the Wall.
70010000114347.intro: The adventure in the mysterious world of the Wall continues!
70010000114347.name: Wall World 2

70010000116079.description:
Get ready for a relaxing and charming puzzle where every move matters and every solution brings that satisfying sense of accomplishment. You take control of a dedicated farmer pig on a mission to organise carrots and radishes into their correct planting spots.

Inspired by classic logic games, it transforms simplicity into a clever challenge. Push, test paths, undo mistakes when needed, and discover the best way to organise each scenario without pressure or time limits.

Explore two delightful environments, the Farm and the Greenhouse, each with unique obstacles that require planning and strategy. With 30 carefully designed levels, the game offers short and satisfying challenges, perfect for players who enjoy calm thinking and creative problem solving.

Plan each move, refine your strategy, and enjoy the moment when everything falls perfectly into place.
70010000116079.name: Piggy's Farm

70010000117302.description:
Island Robot Farm is a relaxing idle farm simulation game. Robots automate farming, production, animal husbandry, and construction to freely develop your massive island.

Automated Robots:
Each robot has unique abilities. Strategic task assignment boosts development efficiency. You can automate specific tasks or let them handle various island affairs autonomously.

Explore Alien Plants:
Beyond Earth's flora, build rockets to explore outer space, discover exotic plants, and bring them back to cultivate on your farm.

Business Simulation:
Experience fresh management gameplay: simply accept orders, plant, harvest, and craft. Sell your beverages to the entire universe!

Grow Crops, Flowers, and Fruits:
Cultivate a wide variety of plants. Process harvests into high-value products to maximize your farm's income.

Animal Husbandry:
Raise various land animals, harvest their products, and process them to further increase your resources and profits.

Sandbox Construction:
Place every tile freely to build and decorate a unique island. Unlock functional buildings and items as technology advances, and build a fully automated mega-island farm with your robots!
70010000117302.intro:
Robots, Farming, and Endless Expansion!
Manage a robot crew to build a massive island farm. Relax, grow, and expand your giant territory in this casual simulation.
70010000117302.name: Island Robot Farm

70010000118889.description:
Jump into fast-paced open-wheel racing and test your skills on the track.

In Formula 2026: Rise of Legends, you’ll drive powerful race cars, take on challenging circuits, and compete against skilled AI drivers. Every race is a chance to improve, push your limits, and climb the ranks.

Whether you're looking for quick racing action or a full career journey, the track is yours.

Features:

Smooth and responsive driving controls
Exciting races on multiple circuits
Career Mode and Quick Race
Competitive AI opponents
Immersive cockpit and dynamic camera views

Win races, improve your driving, and prove you have what it takes to become a racing legend.
70010000118889.intro:
Jump into high-speed racing action
Master every corner
Rise to become a legend
70010000118889.name: Formula 2026: Rise of Legends

70010000120523.description: Running across the road is a very challenging task for a little chicken. Lots of very fast cars and unexpected obstacles. You need a good reaction to help this cute little guy. Don't forget that he has friends and they also want to cross the road.
70010000120523.name: Risky Roads

70010000121670.description:
One Move Away is a 3D, first-person game that blends packing based puzzles with a beautiful art style. Strategically pack away possessions at various stages of three characters' lives.

As we go through life, the number of possessions we accumulate grows, making packing a difficult task. This vast collection of belongings becomes challenging when it's time to pack.

Pack Your Way!

Whether you're a meticulous or chaotic packer, One Move Away challenges you to pack your way. Optimize your strategy or embrace the mess, just make sure the boot closes! 

Handle with care or else…

Be prepared for every action to have a reaction. Expect realistic physics, just like in real life. Items placed carelessly can have a domino effect, pile them too high, and they’ll all fall down! 

Experience the ultimate satisfaction of perfectly packing numerous items, expertly placing each one into its rightful space. Revel in the sense of accomplishment that comes from seeing the packing process from start to finish.

Packing Perfection

Challenge yourself, with multiple objectives to hit that will require you to think strategically .Each level gives you a new packing challenge with different sizes, shapes, and space limits to work around. Can you beat the clock and achieve packing perfection?
70010000121670.intro: A deeply satisfying puzzle game about moving.
70010000121670.name: One Move Away

70010000122677.description:
Move through 3D space to find hints, solve mysteries and escape from the room.
Anyone can play to the end because you can see hints and answers.
70010000122677.name: Escape game R00M13

70010000123081.description:
◆Synopsis
“If you do not wake up... I will play a little prank on you.”

As being the only son of a noble family in the kingdom, 
the personal maid you have hired was your childhood friend Rica Hanamiya.

Having Rica by your side everyday, at every moment,
she teases you nonstop, and your heart would not stop racing!
Hoping that this life would go on forever.

But--

One remark from your father shakes both of your hearts.
Can the two with a different status share the same fate--

◆Characters
Rica Hanamiya（CV：Rica Hanamiya）
Your childhood friend who became your personal maid.
She is diligent and professional on duty, but changes when it is just the two of you.
She loves teasing you and enjoys watching you be nervous.
Maid and a master, also a childhood friend--
Caught between those position, what does she truly feel?

○Novel Game Brand "Rabbitfoot”
A novel game brand that delivers novel games casting active YouTubers and VTubers as game characters.
As well as using their names and nicknames, you can enjoy the different sides of your faves and feel a close connection through the novel game that you cannot experience in the usual streaming or video uploads.
70010000123081.intro: A visual novel with AMSR starring the VTuber Rica Hanamiya.
70010000123081.name: Rica Mode♡

70010000124362.description:
Clown Is Hungry is a comedy horror game about delivering a pizza to a scary Clown.

The pizza girl Kat is already late to a party, but she has one more pizza to deliver late at night. The town is quiet, but this neighbourhood seems to be sinister and creepy. Kat finds weird signs in the street warning about pizza, and to never deliver any pizza here. Kat decides that she has to do her job anyway and ignores the warnings, but soon she realises that they are there for a reason as she knocks on the door of the last house on the street, where the Clown lives.

The game tells a comedic and terrifying story - playing as Kat, the player must deliver the pizza to the scary Clown, but she keeps dropping it on the ground and has to make a new one before the Clown hunts her. Find pizza ingredients, food or other items, put them into a pizza and pray that you don't drop it on your next step. The Clown's world is full of dangers and surprises: traps, minigames, challenges, weird characters, monsters, puzzles and scares - all in a surreal and funhouse/circus aesthetic.

Fun and scary features:
- Pizza box inventory that allows you to turn every item into a slice of pizza
- Mini games! Cheese basketball, tomato cannons, balloons popping, clown-like character challenges...
- Survival horror with the Clown on your tail
- Charming characters you'll meet along the way
- Many various environments to explore
- Terrifying horror parts as well as hilarious jokes, not overstepping on each other to bring you a great experience
70010000124362.intro: Clown Is Hungry is a comedy horror game about delivering a pizza to a hungry clown.
70010000124362.name: Clown Is Hungry

70010000124436.description:
BACKROOMS: ESCAPE THE BRAINROT

The internet has lost its mind. And you're trapped inside.

Enter a mental maze where every room is a rotten meme, every corridor an anxiety attack, and every entity a nightmare laughing at you. A blend of fear, absurdity, and disturbing brilliance that will make you scream, then laugh at how loud you're screaming.

Locations you'll want to forget

Faded poolrooms drowning in dead silence. Endless backrooms heavy with oppressive déjà vu. Brainrot-rooms born from the most feverish corners of the web. Every space is a visual trap.

Entities that laugh at you

Deformed living memes, original nightmare creatures, and brainrot icons reimagined as horror abominations. They want you dead — but first, they want to break your mind.

Gameplay on the edge of panic

Survive, explore, find the brainrot objects, and search for a way out. Dynamic jumpscares, eerie collectibles, cryptic notes, and secret events that change everything.

Free mode

When the story ends, unlock exploration mode: revisit every location, tweak the rules, add more monsters and more brainrot with a single click. Every run is different.

You've seen the backrooms. But you've never escaped them like this.
70010000124436.intro: A grotesque horror born from a rotten internet. Decayed memes, laughing entities, rooms where everything feels wrong. Scream, laugh, and escape the backrooms.
70010000124436.name: Backrooms: Escape The Brainrot

70050000070542.description:
Walls of Judgment
Some places are built to confine the body. Other places are built to attract strange, otherworldly spirits. The Walls of Judgment introduces two grim new locations:
A prison where no one can hear you scream. The church where you may hide from your nightmares.
Behind the iron bars and the locked doors, mortals wait, pace, and pray.
Mortals are unaware they are prey. In the prison, isolation and routine can drive you mad.
If you doubt this truth, ask inmate Kyle, who has been in prison serving a sentence extending into the afterlife. 
In the church, faith is tested. Most win, most of the time. Others are less fortunate.
Justice may be blind… and fear can stare straight through you
70050000070542.name: Walls of Judgment

70050000072121.description:
With over 1.5 million copies sold worldwide, the legendary zombie-hunting action game LOLLIPOP CHAINSAW finally returns in a remastered edition!

Using the nimble moves she honed through cheerleading and wielding a massive chainsaw, Juliet slices through hordes of zombies in exhilarating, over-the-top action!
The Chain Hit Hunting system increases chainsaw attack speed as your combo count rises, while the newly added Chainsaw Blaster with auto-fire cranks up the thrill even further!
With improved playability, dazzling visual effects, and brand-new background music, there’s plenty to enjoy.

Enhanced graphics, a newly added difficulty mode, and numerous other improvements bring the game to a whole new level. This isn’t just a nostalgic revival—it’s a fully refined rebirth of Lollipop Chainsaw in every way!
Introducing LOLLIPOP CHAINSAW RePOP!

＜Story＞
Juliet attends the massive San Romero High School in the American West. She’s an ordinary high school girl who loves cheerleading more than anything.

Right now, she has two worries.
First, she’s gained some weight thanks to her favourite lollipops.
Second, she’s trying to figure out how to tell her new boyfriend Nick that she’s actually a zombie hunter.

And that’s no easy task… because zombie hunters send the undead off to heaven. Not exactly the sort of job a young lady casually brings up!

One morning, as Juliet pedals furiously to meet Nick—already running late—a horde of zombies suddenly appears before her.
As fate would have it, that day is also her 18th birthday. With her birthday ruined, Juliet grabs a chainsaw from her bag and charges into the school, now overrun with zombies, in search of her beloved Nick!
70050000072121.intro: The cute and sexy zombie hunter Juliet goes wild again on Nintendo Switch™ 2!
70050000072121.name: LOLLIPOP CHAINSAW RePOP Nintendo Switch™ 2 Edition Upgrade Pack

70010000110620.description:
Everything changed the moment the signal was lost.
A distant colony on planet Virelia has fallen silent after a mysterious bio-mechanical infection spread across the surface, consuming everything in its path. What was once a functioning world is now a hostile environment where technology and life have merged into something unpredictable and dangerous.

You are Captain Darius Vex, leader of an elite unit sent to investigate, contain, and eliminate the threat. The mission quickly turns into a fight for survival as you move through abandoned facilities, ruined cities, and infected zones where every step forward reveals new dangers.

Combat is shaped by choice and situation. You can move through shadows, disable enemy systems, and avoid detection, or engage directly using advanced energy-based weapons built for high-intensity encounters. Each approach changes how you experience the battlefield, forcing you to adapt constantly.

At the core of your abilities lies a powerful energy control system. You absorb and redirect energy to activate devices, disable threats, generate protective shields, or unleash powerful bursts that can turn the tide of battle. Managing energy becomes just as important as aiming and movement.

Exploration reveals more than just new paths. Hidden areas, data logs, and fragments of information begin to uncover the origin of the infection and what really happened on Virelia. The deeper you go, the more the line between machine and organism begins to disappear.

As you progress, your equipment evolves, your abilities expand, and the enemies grow more aggressive and intelligent. What begins as a mission becomes a descent into the core of an alien system that is still growing.

Survival is not guaranteed. Understanding the threat is the only way forward.
70010000110620.intro: Adapt or become part of it.
70010000110620.name: Dead Gears - Space of War

70010000112463.description:
Midnight Swamp is a dark point-and-click adventure where you will dive into a world of eerie fairy tales. Play as a tourist who must find a way out of a mysterious swamp, where every corner hides a riddle.

A mysterious laugh echoed from the lake on that restless summer night. One careless step outside the tent — and you find yourself dragged into a dark world of shifting swamps, inhabited by strange creatures and filled with hidden secrets.

Soon, a talking Cat convinces you to enter the inhospitable castle rising above the swamp, while the Witch from the gingerbread house teaches you the basics of potion brewing. Will you have the courage to uncover the mystery of this place?

Features:
- A variety of puzzles, potion crafting, and location exploration
- A dark swamp hiding a sinister secret
- Many strange inhabitants for you to meet
- Hand-drawn graphics
70010000112463.intro: A dark point-and-click adventure where you will dive into a world of eerie fairy tales
70010000112463.name: Midnight Swamp

70010000118979.description:
Kiko the bear has one goal: to bake the biggest apple pie ever for the annual Apple Festival! To do that, Kiko needs lots of apples.

Curious and excited, Kiko sets off on a wooden raft to explore fun and colorful islands, discovering new surprises and collecting apples along the way.

Some naughty creatures are trying to stop Kiko… But Kiko is clever and always one step ahead!

Features:
- About 2-4 hours playtime
- 50+ puzzles, on a gentle difficulty curve, ranging from easy to challenging
- Every puzzle can be freely skipped to return to later
- Enemies with fun and surprising behaviors
- Cartoony graphics
- Relaxing music and playful sounds
70010000118979.intro: Push apples, move the rafts, and outsmart silly enemies in this adorable puzzle adventure!
70010000118979.name: Kiko's Apple Adventure

70010000119597.description:
Your life has come to an end, when you find Frog God he seems impressed. Turns out most frog souls need a soul reaper to show them the way to the afterlife.

And there seems to be few soul reapers currently, which is why he offers you a job! You can earn reincarnation if you collect enough lost frog souls. 

For that task you’ve been gifted with the ability to stop and resume time at your will. You can also soot a projectile of goo you can ride!

Jump over moving platforms, avoid pits, spikes, and enemies to rescue those souls.

How many souls can you save? Find out in this timeless puzzle platformer.


Features
* Mix of 2D and 3D visuals
* 4 different biomes
* Time-stopping game mechanic
* Puzzle platformer
70010000119597.intro: Use your new ability to stop time to complete the levels
70010000119597.name: A Frog's Job 2: Froggina

70010000119647.description:
"There is a saying that when you depart from this world, the dog who went ahead will warmly welcome you."

Bong-gu the Welsh Corgi was once an abandoned dog. Judging by his docked tail, someone had once cared for him, but for some reason, he became unwanted. As an 8-year-old senior dog with various illnesses, it was hard for him to find a new family. Trapped in a cage at an animal shelter, each day passed gloomily for Bong-gu. Then one day, a miracle happened. Bong-gu met a new family. The man who took Bong-gu had a somewhat scruffy appearance and seemed slightly awkward, but Bong-gu loved his scent. From that day on, Bong-gu lived out his remaining days just like any other dog would: playing tug-of-war, running around, eating, and sleeping. In the end, he crossed the rainbow bridge, having lived out a simple yet joyful life.

Sniff sniff… this scent… One day in dog heaven, Bong-gu wakes from his nap to a very familiar scent. Sniff sniff… it's dad!. Though faint, surely it is dad's scent he has been waiting for. Jubilant, Bong-gu escapes dog heaven and embarks on a journey to meet his dad - a journey that may hold unexpected dangers. Just as his dad once found him by some miracle, it is now Bong-gu’s turn to find his dad.

Will Bong-gu be able to see his dad again?

[An adventure in a beautiful world filled with stories of dogs and people]

Teetering on the border between life and death, a world outside of dog heaven feels both familiar and strange. Embark on an adventure through beautifully crafted landscapes including deserts, snowy mountains, and beaches. Experience diverse gameplay across adventure, action, racing genres. And remember, Bong-gu is a dog! Actions like sniffing, barking, running, and jumping come with limitations. To overcome his limitations and reunite with his dad, he must meet, give, and receive help from people and other dogs, each with unique stories to share. Unlike cats, there is only so much a dog can do alone!

[In the end, this is a story for all of us]

At the end of his journey, Bong-gu finally reunites with his dad. The journey is filled with joy and excitement, but also moments of hardship and sadness. Yet, the ending has always been written: those destined to meet again will find their way back together. My Little Puppy may be a story about a dog, but it is also a story of relationships, farewells, and reunions that speaks to us all. For those waiting to see their once-in-a-lifetime friend or family member again, or those preparing for an inevitable parting that may come, we hope this story brings warm comfort. One day, we will meet again.
70010000119647.intro: "They say a dog who went ahead waits to welcome you in the end."
70010000119647.name: My Little Puppy

70010000123637.description:
Get ready for a cute and addictive savanna adventure. In Zoo Orbs Safari, adorable animals fall into glass containers full of personality, and it is up to you to merge them into bigger creatures. Combine two identical animals and climb the evolution chain until you reach the majestic Giraffe, the ultimate trophy of your run.

Each merge creates a small burst that nudges nearby pieces, triggering fun chain reactions and keeping the pile alive. It is easy to understand, but full of clever decisions with every drop.

Instead of short stages, the game features 5 replayable levels, each with a unique container shape and its own mission set. Three objectives are active at the same time, and whenever you complete one, a new one appears to keep the challenge fresh.

With no time pressure and no power-ups, everything depends on your ability to read the space, plan your drops, and handle the physics. Slopes, gaps, and tight spaces make each level feel different and strategic.

Complete mission sets to unlock new levels or keep playing in endless mode to chase higher scores. It is the perfect mix of light strategy, charming visuals, and that irresistible “just one more run” feeling.

Observe, merge, reorganise, and shape the savanna your way.
70010000123637.intro: Stack, Merge and Reach the Giraffe
70010000123637.name: Zoo Orbs: Safari

70010000125025.description:
Explore the haunting remnants of a world reshaped by fire and time. Scorched Lands is an atmospheric first-person exploration experience set across a vast, otherworldly desert landscape — where volcanic rock formations tower over ancient skeletal ruins, alien flora blooms defiantly from cracked earth, and the sky burns a permanent crimson.
You are a lone wanderer equipped with field instruments and a quiet curiosity. Seek out marked locations across a hostile yet breathtaking terrain — satellite dishes humming in the silence, solar arrays catching light on ridge lines, lava fields glowing just beyond the next canyon wall. Every destination tells a story. Every horizon promises something new.

Features:

Stunning low-poly art direction that transforms desolation into beauty
Multiple distinct biomes — scorched volcanic badlands, sun-bleached desert flats, and eerie overgrown ruins
A meditative, pressure-free pace — no enemies, no timers, just exploration
Rich environmental storytelling hidden in the landscape itself
Perfect for short sessions or long, unhurried wanderings
70010000125025.intro: The world burned. Something survived. So did you.
70010000125025.name: Scorched Lands

70050000060184.description:
Shallot from the mobile game DRAGON BALL LEGENDS joins the battle!

1  Playable character:
- Shallot

Enjoy new battles with the main character of DRAGON BALL LEGENDS, designed by Akira Toriyama!
70050000060184.name: DRAGON BALL: Sparking! ZERO - Shallot (DRAGON BALL LEGENDS)

70050000060202.description:
New warriors from the Dragon Ball DAIMA anime series join the battle!

- 8 Playable Characters:
• Goku (Mini), Super Saiyan
• Vegeta (Mini)
• Vegeta (Mini), Super Saiyan
• Vegeta (Mini), Super Saiyan 2
• Vegeta (Mini), Super Saiyan 3
• Glorio
• Panzy
• Majin Kuu

‐ Goku (Mini) Technique-changing Outfit
• New costume for Goku (Mini) that changes his moves

*Goku (Mini) Technique-changing Outfit is different from Pre-Order Pack Goku (Mini).
*Ownership of Pre-Order Pack Goku (Mini) is not required.
*Equipping the Goku (Mini) Technique-changing Outfit costume on Goku (Mini) will not alter his appearance.
*Equipping the Goku (Mini) Technique-changing Outfit costume on Goku (Mini) will transform his Ultimate Blast into Aura Impact.
70050000060202.name: DRAGON BALL: Sparking! ZERO - Dragon Ball DAIMA: Character Pack 1

70050000060203.description: Contains playable characters from the Dragon Ball DAIMA series.
70050000060203.name: DRAGON BALL: Sparking! ZERO - Dragon Ball DAIMA: Character Pack 2

70010000109498.description: Mori Carta is a handless deckbuilding roguelike. Choose left or right on every card to adventure through stories. Simple decisions lead to rich and rewarding gameplay. Four dramatically different characters with their own unique card sets, more than 1000 playable cards, over 185 unique enemies.
70010000109498.intro: Decide fast. Build smart. Survive longer.
70010000109498.name: Mori Carta

70010000119794.description: Smash and break everyone on your way down the slope. There is no time to stop and no time for mercy.  Just charge forward, ignoring all obstacles.
70010000119794.intro: You are a wheel. A truly deadly wheel. No one will be safe in your path.
70010000119794.name: Rolling Wheels

70010000119937.description:
This game is a drone simulation game that allows you to experience real drone flight based on footage shot by a real flying drone. 
There is no up, down, left or right direction control, only the control to increase or decrease the drone speed. 
You can also change the drone's flight mode from Normal, Sport, and Eco to any of the 3. 

Enjoy the beautiful scenery of Anmyeon-eup, Korea with "Real" footage! 
There are a total of 2 flight courses in 1 areas.
High-definition footage faithfully reproduces the atmosphere of real nature, providing a strong sense of immersion in the game. 
Smooth and realistic video playback makes you feel like you are a real drone pilot. 
Large capacity! You can fly to locations that show the beautiful scenery of Korea! 
Two play modes are supported: course-specific flying mode and view mode automatic flight. There is also an achievement system. 
Visit Korea from home at any time! 
Enjoy the drone flight control experience and the beautiful natural scenery. MasCon for Nintendo Switch™ made by Zuiki of Japan is also supported.
70010000119937.name: Korean Drone Flying Tour Anmyeon-eup

70010000123692.description:
Learning is fun when you have friends around!

Meet the animals, plants, people and other lovely things that you can find around farms, forests, or seas and oceans.

Learn shapes, match colorful pictures with their silhouettes, get to know their names, and make the final picture come to life through interacting with different things!

A suitable adventure for even the youngest of curious explorers!
70010000123692.intro: Play and learn who lives in farmlands, forests and seas!
70010000123692.name: Animal Puzzles

70010000118268.description:
This pack includes the games:

Speedway Racing
Grand Prix Rock ´N Racing
Hypercar Racing

In Speedway Racing, you will enjoy the fastest, most spectacular races at over 350 Km/h, avoiding multiple collisions against 12 rivals.
There are several modes available, including Championship, Arcade and 4-player multiplayer.

Grand Prix Rock 'N Racing gives you the fastest, most exciting races. You can evolve your car, improving the engine, brakes, tires and more until you've achieved the perfect evolution to win the Championship!

In Hypercar Racing you'll enjoy the dirtiest, fastest, and most spectacular races at speeds over 200 Mp/h, avoiding multiple collisions against 8 adversaries. The game has different modes, such as Championship, Arcade, and 4-player multiplayer.

Features:

- Wide variety of tracks.
- Multi-player with 4 players.
- Races with 12 opponents.
- Realistic driving physics.
- Lots of Rock 'N Roll music.
70010000118268.intro: Enjoy 3 games in 1 with this irresistible speed games pack!
70010000118268.name: Asphalt Racing Bundle 3 in 1

70010000100647.description:
- D&D-inspired visual novel with 8 unique characters. 
- Immersive reading experience of at least 6 hours on your first play-through. 
- Branching narrative with 3 unique endings.
- Casual drink mixing and quest building with a dash of challenge – a refinement of the original game’s mechanics.
- LGBTQ+ positive representation. 
- Content warning: mentions of death, grief, and violence.
- A new standalone game in the Tavern Talk universe!

Once Upon A Time...
...you find yourself in a little, bleary portside town in the south-east of Phesoa. There, 36 years before the events of Tavern Talk, you dive into the role of the Tavernkeep, the owner of The Drowsy Dragon, a small quayside bar on the coast of Borkam. 

You have a special ability, gifted by one of the Great Dragon Gods or acquired through wizardly hubris: Mixing magic drinks that can alter the fate of your guests—be it mean mercenaries, savvy sailors or ambitious adventurers. Every guest, no matter who they are, has a place in your warm tavern by the seaside. 

In The Drowsy Dragon, fate is not written in the stars, it is written in the menu! Mix unique drinks from a wide ensemble of magical potions—but be aware: There is more than one solution! 

As you listen to stories brimming with the spirit of adventure, you sit within the cozy walls of your tavern and pick up rumors to turn them into quests. Some of them are old sailor’s yarn, so sort them thoroughly before sticking them up the wall! 

As you meet new and familiar faces, all seems well. Your establishment is flourishing and friendships are made. All until something starts brewing on the horizon, something that’s going to twist your brightest dreams into your darkest nightmares. 

Content Warning
Like in every good Pen & Paper campaign, Tavern Talk Stories: Dreamwalker touches topics that may hit right in the feels. Please be aware that there will be mentions of death, grief and violence.
70010000100647.intro: In this D&D-inspired visual novel you will run a cozy seaside tavern, meet adventurers, gather rumours and mix fate-altering drinks to stop dreams from twisting into nightmares.
70010000100647.name: Tavern Talk Stories: Dreamwalker

70010000116474.description:
Find the hidden kitties around the apartment! Secret Paws - Cozy Apartments is an isometric hidden object game themed around cats and colorful little rooms. Explore unique, adorably decorated cube-shaped bedrooms, kitchens, living rooms, bathrooms and more as you search for dozens of cleverly obscured felines lying around each stage.

By finding all the cats in an apartment, you’ll clear the stage and unlock the next. Secret Paws - Cozy Apartments is calm, casual and therapeutic with a soothing soundtrack to match, making it the perfect “anytime” experience!

• Find the cats hidden in colorful isometric apartments!
• Unlock new rooms of gradually increasing complexity.
• Rotate the apartment rooms to change your viewpoint and avoid obstructions!
• Click on cleverly placed felines to reduce the cat counter to zero.
70010000116474.intro: Solve feline-themed hidden object challenges in cute cube-shaped isometric apartments!
70010000116474.name: Secret Paws - Cozy Apartments

70010000096066.description:
Assemble your team, build your roster of iconic Star Wars™ characters, and battle with your friends and family for control of the galaxy as you move across storied planets and locations.
Choose from a wide array of Star Wars heroes and villains, each with their own unique abilities. Whether you're teaming up with Luke Skywalker or unleashing Darth Vader, every match is packed with team strategy, surprises, and classic Star Wars moments. No two battles unfold the same way, the fate of your team is yours to shape!

STAR WARS MEETS MONOPOLY®
Step into the Star Wars galaxy with a bold new twist on MONOPOLY. Experience iconic cinematic moments while competing with family and friends across iconic locations from every era of the saga.

PLAY AS A TEAM, WIN AS A TEAM
Team up with your friends and family through online play or couch co-op and experience MONOPOLY like never before with 2v2 and 3v3 competitive game modes. With endless team compositions, the game transforms classic competition into a fun strategic showdown.

ASSEMBLE YOUR ICONIC STAR WARS TEAM
Each character brings distinct hero abilities, allowing you to shape your team’s composition and lead your team to victory. Command legends like Darth Maul and Princess Leia, each with game-changing skills that turn the tide in your favor.

COMMAND THE DICE, CONTROL THE BOARD
The game can change with every roll as properties change hands in an instant. Dynamic GO events unleash game-altering twists and shift momentum rapidly, making each turn critical and victory uncertain until the final turn.

A NEW ADVENTURE EVERY MATCH
With action-packed matches, evolving team strategies, and tons of unlockable cosmetics, no two games are exactly the same. Experiment with different heroes to assemble the perfect team. There's always a reason to jump back in for one more round.
70010000096066.name: Monopoly: Star Wars™ Heroes vs. Villains

70010000100252.description:
Unrailed 2: Back on Track brings chaotic local and online multiplayer track-building action to the next level – band together with friends to collaborate and build your track across new procedurally generated worlds - WHILST the train is running! So think fast, with more freedom than ever before, and conquer new obstacles in your way - before your trains becomes… a trainwreck! 

CHOOSE YOUR TRACK 
Now featuring a story spread across new environments, on branching paths for you to choose, so no two runs will feel the same. In these biomes you’ll now be able encounter new points of interests, side quests, daunting bosses and as well as other random encounters, so adapt quickly on your feet! New unlockable cosmetics also let you add your personal touch to your characters’ story. 

YOUR JOURNEY GETS BETTER AND BETTER 
Every excursion your crew undertakes feels increasingly meaningful, with new rewards and permanent upgrades granting you character with gameplay-modifying abilities, as well as new train engines, wagons and extensions to unlock, giving you the tools to build a multitude of train configurations to play and experiment with. Each locomotive loss is an opportunity to rebuild and get… back on track! 

CREATE, SHARE AND PLAY WITH THE COMMUNITY 
The all-new Terrain Conductor mode allows you unleash your imagination to create your very own custom maps and share these with the Unrailed community – with highlights being featured by the developers. Or if creating isn’t your thing, browse the limitless creations other players have built, so the frantic fun never ends! 

CO-OPERATE TO COMPETE 
Fulfill your burning competitive urge – manically duke it out in against another team in the new 8-player Vs Mode. Test your team’s prowess in online leaderboards with action replays and see who can achieve the highest scores.
70010000100252.intro: Unrailed is back on track with more co-op railroad construction chaos than ever!
70010000100252.name: Unrailed 2: Back on Track

70010000105160.description:
KILL ALL ENEMIES

Arashi Gaiden is a turn-based action game with fast-paced dash and slash combat. Use the dash mechanic to quickly traverse levels and slice your enemies in half in style, combining your blade with shurikens, teleports and chains that paralyze your opponents.

BREAK THE TURN STRUCTURE

Overcome levels with mechanics that change how you play and face Bosses that redefine what a turn-based game is by using special abilities in real time.

Stop the time of your enemies, play shurikens, teleport and change the direction of your dash!
Use special skills to master the field of combat, make combos and win creatively.

Survive 7 bosses that also break the turn structure, using bombs, traps, flying cuts, flames and more! Play carefully or frantically, the choice is yours.

- Over 5 hours of fun in turn-based combat, with diverse challenges and multiple solutions.
- A new level for an innovative combat system, Dash and Slash: enjoy turn-based combat with fast moves.
- Experience a stylish turn-based action game with puzzle features (or vice versa).

WIN WITH STYLE

- Get Power-Ups as you progress through the game, but manage them well during the match.
- Achieve the perfect score in each room.
- Replay each Stage with new powers after unlocking it.
- Enjoy guts and blood flying everywhere in pixel art while cutting your enemies in beautiful stages featuring settings from different locations in Japan.
- Discover Arashi's story, his involvement with Lobo and deepen the Lore of the Bravery Universe.
70010000105160.intro: A fast-paced turn-based action game where you unleash swift, stylish attacks to defeat enemies and mechanically unique bosses.
70010000105160.name: Arashi Gaiden

70010000105360.description:
Take the role of an unhinged lady chemist in raucous side-scrolling platformer Love Chemistry - Sibella’s Formula! Shoot syringes of your special mind-control formula at weird enemies, from robots and carnivorous plants to roving bookworms, and make your way through tricky corridors in old-school pixel art style!

Avoid thorny spike traps, climb ladders to reach higher platforms, dodge projectiles and manipulate foes into falling for your flirty charms. Find and collect health items to keep this wild adventure on track as you battle through laboratories, cityscapes and more, zipping between stages on your high-tech hover bike!

• Run, jump and climb through laboratories and city streets.
• Battle roving robots, bookworms, monsters and more.
• Shoot syringes of your “love potion” to manipulate enemies.
• Avoid treacherous traps and collect useful items to survive.
• Enjoy retro pixel art with colourful HD presentation.
70010000105360.intro: Make your enemies fall for you in a side-scrolling platforming adventure about weird science!
70010000105360.name: Love Chemistry - Sibella's Formula

70010000119806.description:
You close the door of your refrigerator and an interesting life begins inside. Fruits and vegetables try to escape from this big white cage. Break everything around you and smash through shelves to find a way out. The more precise the timing of the jump, the more powerful the impact. That's exactly what you need to succeed! 

Try to get out all the fruits and vegetables out of the fridge. Carrot, cucumber, sausage, and even a spoon for some reason.

Check out the new fun game from the NOSTRA.GAMES team. 

Let the Big Fridge Riot begin!
70010000119806.intro: Bouncing fruits and vegetables in your fridge - what could be more unusual?
70010000119806.name: Flippy Jump

70010000126709.description:
Unrailed 2: Back on Track brings chaotic local and online multiplayer track-building action to the next level – band together with friends to collaborate and build your track across new procedurally generated worlds - WHILST the train is running! So think fast, with more freedom than ever before, and conquer new obstacles in your way - before your trains becomes… a trainwreck! 

CHOOSE YOUR TRACK 
Now featuring a story spread across new environments, on branching paths for you to choose, so no two runs will feel the same. In these biomes you’ll now be able encounter new points of interests, side quests, daunting bosses and as well as other random encounters, so adapt quickly on your feet! New unlockable cosmetics also let you add your personal touch to your characters’ story. 

YOUR JOURNEY GETS BETTER AND BETTER 
Every excursion your crew undertakes feels increasingly meaningful, with new rewards and permanent upgrades granting you character with gameplay-modifying abilities, as well as new train engines, wagons and extensions to unlock, giving you the tools to build a multitude of train configurations to play and experiment with. Each locomotive loss is an opportunity to rebuild and get… back on track! 

CREATE, SHARE AND PLAY WITH THE COMMUNITY 
The all-new Terrain Conductor mode allows you unleash your imagination to create your very own custom maps and share these with the Unrailed community – with highlights being featured by the developers. Or if creating isn’t your thing, browse the limitless creations other players have built, so the frantic fun never ends! 

CO-OPERATE TO COMPETE 
Fulfill your burning competitive urge – manically duke it out in against another team in the new 8-player Vs Mode. Test your team’s prowess in online leaderboards with action replays and see who can achieve the highest scores.
70010000126709.intro: Unrailed is back on track with more co-op railroad construction chaos than ever!
70010000126709.name: Unrailed 2: Back on Track – Nintendo Switch™ 2 Edition

70050000071071.description:
Prepare for a journey to a galaxy far, far away! Whether you’re bartering in the desert sands or marching in formation, these pre-order bonuses will make your next game night feel like you’ve scavenged treasure in the Outer Rim.

Pre-Order Bonus

Jawa: Roll with the resourcefulness of a Tatooine scavenger. Perfect for finding luck in the most unlikely places!

Stormtrooper: Bring order to the board with the iconic Galactic Empire soldier. Don’t worry – these dice won’t miss their target!
70050000071071.name: Pre-Order Bonus – Set of Dice

70050000073474.description: This is an Upgrade Pack, if you already own Unrailed 2: Back on Track for Nintendo Switch™, you can upgrade to the Nintendo Switch™ 2 Edition using this product.
70050000073474.intro: Unrailed is back on track with more co-op railroad construction chaos than ever!
70050000073474.name: Unrailed 2: Back on Track Nintendo Switch™ 2 Edition Upgrade Pack

70070000036653.description:
Step into the paws of a mischievous stray cat and experience a world where every moment is an opportunity for fun, chaos, and discovery. Explore lively urban backyards, complete playful tasks, interact with other cats, and turn ordinary surroundings into your personal playground.

This bundle includes main title and Skyfall Paradise DLC which not only lets you live the carefree life of a curious feline but also transforms how your adventure feels. With a brand-new skybox included, the world above you comes alive in fresh and atmospheric tones — from bright and cheerful to calm and magical — adding a whole new layer of immersion to every jump, dig, and stroll.
70070000036653.intro: Turn every yard into your playground.
70070000036653.name: Bodycam Stray Kitty Gold Edition

70010000060618.description: Outsmart and outgun your opponent in R-Type Tactics I • II Cosmos, the ultimate turn-based sci-fi strategy collection! This two-game combination of the classic R-Type Tactics titles arrives on modern consoles for the first time, equipped with an armada of unique units to deploy across dozens of levels. Multiple campaigns allow you to take on the Bydo Empire or even play as them yourself. Their fates are up to you!
70010000060618.intro: The fate of two races depends on you.
70010000060618.name: R-Type Tactics I • II Cosmos

70010000100976.description:
#DRIVE Rally is an arcade-inspired rally racing game set in the golden racing era of the 1990s. Grab your co-driver and burn rubber in iconic, race-winning cars across varied rally stages and terrains in some of the most recognizable rallying locations in the world—perfect for fans of retro racing games and newcomers alike.

From the sunny landscapes of Dry Crumbs, through the whispering woods of Holzberg, to the chilly wilderness of Revontuli; take a journey through a diverse world you haven’t experienced in racing games before. Each destination delivers distinctive stage design and visual flair that celebrate classic ’90s rally vibes.

Jump behind the wheel of legendary rally cars, including Das Holzwagen, The Doggo, The Bobond, and many more. Build and customize your cars from the ground up to match your driving style and rally your way. Personalize the body, paintwork, and decals, then add that cherry on top with custom decorations - create a ride that feels truly your own.

Don’t forget the co-driver! Your co-driver can be your biggest cheerleader and toughest judge. It’s a partnership that thrives on performance and emotion. Their goal is to assist your runs with helpful navigation and tips to improve your stage times - making every run feel dynamic and replayable.

Features
• The spirit of ’90s rally for players of all ages and generations

• Exciting driving mechanics, simple to start but demanding in depth

• Stunning rally tracks and locations inspired by the world

• Retro-inspired cars with awesome personalization and car customization options

• Compete on online leaderboards to be the best and prove your rally skills
70010000100976.intro: Put your foot down and redefine speed in #DRIVE Rally!
70010000100976.name: #DRIVE Rally

70010000119818.description: Learn to react quickly to unconventional situations. Maneuver your way through sneaky enemies and use your attacks to destroy planetary defenses.
70010000119818.intro: Fire up your blasters and smash through any planet's defenses!
70010000119818.name: Planet Divers

70010000121246.description:
Welcome to Enterprise Corp.
We are pleased to have you.

Your job is simple. You must press the button when the system instructs you to do so.

The system will evaluate your punctuality, consistency, and ability to follow instructions.
Good performance will result in promotions within the corporate hierarchy.
Poor performance will have immediate consequences.

There is no need to understand the internal workings of the processes.
All relevant information will be provided when appropriate.

The system does not make mistakes.
The system records every action.

Thank you for your interest in becoming part of Enterprise Corp.

In “Just. Press. The Button.”, every action counts and every decision defines you. Explore a world where obedience to rules is not optional and promotions come with increasing expectations. "Just. Press. The Button." places you face to face with routine and constant corporate pressure as you attempt to maintain your position within the hierarchy.

Prepare for a dystopian experience that blends the race for success, monotony, tension, and the consequences of every step, all while the system watches, evaluates, and records your every move.
70010000121246.name: Just. Press. The Button.

70010000103345.description:
SAEKO: Giantess Dating Sim is an adventure game set in 2000s Japan about the lives of Saeko, a girl with mysterious abilities, and the little people she has shrunk to the size of her thumb. Experience Saeko's and the little people's fates in the day and at night, through two separate game systems with different art styles.

You are Rin, the latest addition to the little people. Under Saeko’s protection, you spend your days in her desk drawer together with the other little people.
But don't let your guard down. Saeko has some...interesting hobbies, to say the least.

・Stunning and unique visuals drawn in two different styles of pixel art
・A world filled with brutal allure inspired by many strange tales, beginning with Fueti Shizue’s work
・An original game system which forces players to make difficult choices and live with the consequences
・A soundtrack heavily influenced by future garage and breakcore, composed by the developer himself
・The deepest journey into a developer’s proclivities in indie game history
70010000103345.intro: You opened your eyes to find a giant girl looking down at you...
70010000103345.name: SAEKO: Giantess Dating Sim

70010000119730.description:
Burn rubber, fire rockets, and survive the arena in this explosive combat racing experience.

RACE: Rocket Arena Car Extreme throws you into a post-apocalyptic world of armoured cars, deadly tracks, and all-out vehicular warfare. Every race is a battle where speed, firepower, and survival decide who rules the arena.

Play solo or challenge friends in local split-screen mode and prove who dominates the battlefield.

Pick from 21 unique cars, each with its own ultimate ability, upgrade path, and special body kits. Choose your class - SPEEDSTER, GUNNER, or CRUSHER - and master a wide arsenal of abilities, from rocket salvos and mini-missiles to teleport swaps, laser drones, flamethrowers, ghost summons, freezing blasts, and electric traps.

Race through 7 locations, face 5 unique bosses, and test your skills across Career, Event, Season, and Split-Screen modes. Every boss features distinct mechanics and attack patterns, from rocket barrages and enemy summons to teleport strikes, poison shots, and ice crystal traps.

With a variety of mission types and deep upgrade systems, every run offers a new way to dominate the road.

Event mode features tournaments built around specific cars, where you build your run by choosing skill cards between stages and survive with a single shared HP bar.

Season mode introduces daily challenges and leaderboards - complete missions, set records, and earn rewards.

Features:
• 20+ hours of combat racing in Career mode
• 21 unique cars with ultimate abilities
• 3 car classes: SPEEDSTER, GUNNER, CRUSHER
• 4 game modes: Career, Event, Season, Split-Screen
• 7 distinct locations and 5 unique bosses
• Wide range of weapons, abilities, and upgrades
• Local split-screen multiplayer on one console
70010000119730.intro: Jump into explosive combat racing where every track is a battlefield and every rival is a target.
70010000119730.name: RACE: Rocket Arena Car Extreme

70010000122560.description:
Welcome to The Artifactory, a fast-paced couch co-op party game where teamwork, creativity, and a little factory chaos keep the production line moving.

Work together with up to four players to gather materials, craft items, and assemble loot boxes before the delivery trucks leave. Pass ingredients along conveyor belts, organize the production line, and keep the factory running smoothly.

But crafting isn’t just about following recipes. Experiment with different raw materials to discover new item combinations and unlock new ways to produce goods. The more you explore, the more efficient your factory can become.

Each level introduces new challenges — moving platforms, tricky conveyor layouts, and unpredictable obstacles that will test your coordination and communication.

Whether you are playing with friends, family, or going solo, every shift at the factory turns into a hilarious cooperative challenge where timing, teamwork, and quick thinking make all the difference.

Can your team master the machines and keep the deliveries on schedule?

Key Features
Local couch co-op for up to 4 players
Experiment with materials to discover new crafting recipes
Build and manage chaotic production lines
Creative factory environments with unique mechanics
Fast, cooperative party gameplay
Perfect for family game nights and multiplayer sessions
70010000122560.intro: Team up in a chaotic factory where crafting, experimentation, and fast teamwork keep the production line alive.
70010000122560.name: The Artifactory

70010000123974.description:
INCOMING BROADCAST
"Welcome to Rabbithole City, where all animals live a fulfilling life outside nature in this modern, neon-lit city - and it's all thanks to the mightiest species of all: bunnies! A few years ago, they brought us technological progress and a life of fun and pleasure. 

And the small price for such a life? Leaving your filthy natural habitat and your instincts behind. Especially you, carnivores, should change your ways if you want to be accepted in this glorious society. "


FREE THE OPRESSED
Not everyone agrees with the bunnies and many species are suffering under this strict rabbit regime.

You are recruited by a giant Owl who needs your help to sabotage the Bunny Tyranny. He gives you control over the body of a tiger-lynx, Kiyo, and sends you on various stealth and platforming missions to uncover the bunnies’ wicked plans. To avoid the merciless rabbit police, you'll need to make clever decisions about when to be stealthy or violent, or both. Hide in the dynamic shadows, use distractions, attacks, and ninja rope acrobatics, and don't get caught!


THE NIGHTLIFE IS CALLING
Take your time and get lost in the atmosphere of Rabbithole City. Learn more about life in this world, meet colorful characters, explore different locations, and discover how evil the bunnies really are.

Feel the seductive pull of the neon lights and immersive synth-wave beats, but be careful - do not lose sight of your mission.
70010000123974.intro: Kiyo, a feline ex-predator, is trapped in a neon-lit, dystopian city dominated by smartphone-addicted bunnies. Infiltrate the bunnies' facilities and free everyone from their tyrannical grip.
70010000123974.name: KIYO - Bunny Tyranny

70050000056437.description: Adds Character 4 to the roster of playable characters.
70050000056437.name: Additional Character 4

70050000070125.description:
This DLC unlocks a brand new world for hexceed: Centaurus! 
Puzzle your way through 140 brand-new levels!
70050000070125.intro: Unlocks a new world for hexceed: Centaurus brings 140 new puzzles and includes all mechanics from the previous DLC.
70050000070125.name: Centaurus

70050000070553.description:
Between Worlds
Not all places are meant to be destinations. The Train Station is a place of arrivals, departures, and fleeting encounters. Mortals pass through, never feeling safe, as though they are being watched. Platforms fade into the darkness. The tunnels echo with distant sounds from the past and the present. Panic spreads faster than the Phantom Train Conductor can operate his locomotive.

Introducing a new Train Station level built upon crowds, open spaces, and relentless motion. No place ever feels secure.

Introducing a new game mode: Second Side of the Coin.

For the first time, step into the role of a Ghost-breaker who hunts ghosts, sets traps, and experiences fear from the other side—where control is fleeting and fragile, resources are limited, and every mistake means punishment.
70050000070553.name: Between Worlds

70050000072125.description:
Expand your garage with the RACE - Razor Pack!

Razor is a heavy Gunner-class combat monster truck built for explosive arena racing. With massive tires, armored bodywork, and mounted weapons, it is ready to crush rivals and tear through post-apocalyptic tracks.

Its ultimate ability, Judgment Day, increases the damage of rocket attacks when activated, giving Razor extra firepower in combat.

This DLC includes:
- Razor car
- 6 vinyls
- 6 flags
- 4 avatars

Vinyls and flags can be used on any unlocked car.
70050000072125.intro: Unlock the Razor car and exclusive customization items.
70050000072125.name: RACE - Razor Pack

70050000046471.description: The Painted Red Crime Scene includes a Location, 6 Suspects, 4 Customisation Items, and 6 Tokens
70050000046471.name: Cluedo - Painted Red

70050000058969.description:
Delve deeper into the eerie lands of The Spiral. 

This additional tale enriches the experience and let you uncover hidden secrets, new perspectives, and unexpected horrors.
70050000058969.name: Little Nightmares III - First Additional Chapter

70010000113011.description:
A 2D pixel art roguelike space shooter with plugged resource management, procedural levels and challenging bosses! Hold the controls tight and do not get stranded in the void!

PLUG 'N' SHOOT

- Plug in to recharge your energy and manage your resources.
- Be Careful! Once plugged, you'll only be able to move within the range of your cable!
- Space is plunged into darkness, activate the spacesockets to clear a level and travel to the next sector.

FIGHT

- Choose between 10+ different ships with different gameplay modes!
- Blast your mega-laser!
- Form an army of rescued stranded ships that will fight alongside you!
- Destroy the stages and defeat a large variety of enemies!
- Encounter dangerous and challenging BOSSES after each galaxy in your quest.

SLOW DOWN TIME

Holding the breach, dodging enemy bullets, and piloting through narrow hallways shouldn't be a problem, BUT just in case...
- Your ship is equipped with a futuristic Slow-Mo System that you can use almost whenever you want!
- Luckily for you, it recharges by collecting energy from dead enemies!

UPGRADE

- Pick up BATTERIES and discover +250 combinations of bullet modifiers!
- Get CHIPS of temporary upgrades by destroying enemies!
- Choose between more than 40 upgrades for your ship.
- Optimize charge times, improve your firepower, get more cable length...
- Become invisible to enemies.

And more!
70010000113011.intro: Hyperwired is a roguelike top-down action shooter, where your spaceship has a plug hanging from it.
70010000113011.name: HYPERWIRED

70010000122819.description:
Anyone can feel the flow in Rhythm Paradise Groove! Discover a colourful collection of funny little rhythm games, including music by renowned Japanese producer Tsunku♂.

You can do anything with rhythm! 
No matter how strange the situation, the rules are always the same: just press buttons in time with the beat! Hop through hoops, catch flying vegetables, swing sledgehammers, and much more – perform surprising feats with the music as your guide!
70010000122819.name: Rhythm Paradise Groove

70010000110954.description:
Digimon Story Time Stranger is an RPG with monster-taming elements that explores the deep bond between humans and Digimon in an epic story that unravels the mystery of the world’s collapse.

Embark on an adventure that spans across the human world and Digital World, collecting and raising a diverse array of Digimon to fight in turn-based battles.

An Epic Story of Connection
Tokyo, Japan – An agent of a secret organization encounters an unknown creature shortly before a city-leveling explosion. They then reawaken eight years in the past...
Take on a mission to uncover the mystery of the world’s collapse, where chance encounters with unique characters will shape your journey across time and parallel worlds - and change fate itself.

Adventure Between Worlds and Time
Journey between the parallel human world and the Digital World: Iliad where Digimon reside. Explore the Digital World and its intricately detailed realms and discover all of its secrets.

Strategic Turn-Based Battles
Enjoy dynamic turn-based combat that combines strategic elements with evolved battle components. More than 450 Digimon and deep customization options provide limitless ways to approach the challenges of battle and reveal the strength of the bonds formed with your Digimon.

*This product is the Standard Edition. A Deluxe Edition and Ultimate Edition are also available. Please be careful of duplicate purchases.
70010000110954.name: Digimon Story Time Stranger

The Prince of Tennis Sweet School Festival ~♡-40 and more...~ is a globally remastered edition of a legendary otome game that has been beloved in Japan for more than 20 years.

<Story>
During a joint school festival hosted by the tennis clubs of seven academies, you are chosen to serve as a member of the festival’s management committee.
Guide and support the players of your assigned school, strengthen your bonds, and strive for first place in the stall competition!

<Features>
- Experience a school life filled with romance, surrounded by many charming Princes.
- Enjoy sweet and bittersweet date events unique to each Prince!

70050000070597.description:
Solid Ice and Terror
Escape the bitter cold outside. Screams echo across the ice, celebrating victories and championships of years past.

A massive industrial hockey arena has been abandoned for years. The lights flicker over empty stands and scarred ice. Mortals enter believing their greatest enemy is the polar vortex, however outside something far worse stalks the rink tonight. What looks cute can be just as terrifying. The officials are watching from beyond.

In Canada, hockey is life—even in the afterlife. Something far worse than the cold stalks the rink on this winter evening. The rules of the natural and the supernatural can change without warning. Some will cry for decades. Others are haunted forever.

Introducing a new level set in an industrial Canadian hockey arena somewhere in Canada. We’ll give you 514 guesses where. Every whistle cuts through the darkness, and every decision feels final.

Beware the supernatural official, Jacques Rougeau, who’s on the job.
“Justice isn’t fair. I don’t care if you get screwed over… bon!"
70050000070597.name: Solid Ice and Terror

70010000070279.description:
The extreme tension of infiltrating without being detected.
Metal Gear series, the pinnacle of “stealth action” Immerse yourself in the Metal Gear series, the pinnacle of “stealth action” where you can infiltrate and elude your enemies to complete missions.

The game takes place five years after the Big Shell incident in METAL GEAR SOLID 2: Sons of Liberty, in a world where war has become a business.
To stop Liquid Ocelot's uprising, Solid Snake throws himself into his final battle.
The battle against Liquid and the Patriots draws to a close, and the mysteries woven throughout the series are now revealed!

【STORY】
THE TRANSFORMATION OF WAR INTO BUSINESS.
In an era where PMCs (private military companies) have risen to the top, war has become a business and the driving force behind the world economy. 

Controlling the top five PMCs from behind the scenes is Liquid Ocelot, who fanning the flames of war even further, plans an insurrection with the goal of creating a world where warriors can lead fulfilling lives—a goal shared by none other than Big Boss. 

Under the theme of “Sense” watch as the final battle of the man with Big Boss’s genes, Solid Snake, unfolds.

----------
The Screenplay Book containing in-game text from Metal Gear Solid 4: Guns of the Patriots and the Master Book detailing the story and characters are also included within the game.

[Game]
Metal Gear Solid 4: Guns of the Patriots
*Versions for other regions can be downloaded separately from the store.

[Digital Contents]
Metal Gear Solid 4 Database
Metal Gear Solid 4: Screenplay Book
Metal Gear Solid 4: Master Book
*Accessible via the in-game Start Menu.

----------
【METAL GEAR SOLID: MASTER COLLECTION Vol.1 Save-Data Bonus】
If you have save data from titles included in METAL GEAR SOLID MASTER COLLECTION Vol.1, you can receive in-game items usable in the game as a bonus.

・Metal Gear Solid 4: Guns of the Patriots Bonus: Gold Camouflage

*Bonus content can be obtained by playing this game respectively.
*This requires that save data for titles included in METAL GEAR SOLID: MASTER COLLECTION Vol.1, created using the same account, be present on the console used to play this game.
*Playing this game first, then starting to play titles included in METAL GEAR SOLID: MASTER COLLECTION Vol.1, still qualifies you for this bonus.
70010000070279.name: METAL GEAR SOLID 4: Guns of the Patriots - Master Collection Version

70010000070284.description:
The extreme tension of infiltrating without being detected.
Metal Gear series, the pinnacle of “stealth action” where you avoid combat and complete missions while hiding.

The game take place 10 years after METAL GEAR SOLID 3: Snake Eater.
Amidst the swirling conspiracies behind the East-West Cold War, Snake confronts them while leading a private military force.
This is the story of how one soldier, “Snake”, becomes “Big Boss”.

【STORY】
THE ILLUSION OF PEACE FALTERS

In 1964, after saving the world from all-out nuclear war, Naked Snake, a true hero, receives the name Big Boss, but he disappears shortly after the naming ceremony.

Ten years later, Big Boss is running an independent military unit in Columbia, when he is visited by two individuals from Costa Rica, a country without a military.

In a post-Cuban Missile Crisis world, and in a Central America essential to maintaining the power balance between East and West, Costa Rica has been miraculously able to maintain peace.
However, a mysterious armed group has been seen acting suspiciously throughout the region.

They request Big Boss to investigate and eliminate the armed group.
Though he hesitates to accept the request because the tape they brought contained the voice of The Boss, who was supposed to be dead.

【System】
This title offers not only thrilling solo infiltration missions but also co-op with “SENYU” via online connections, and competitive multiplayer for up to six players.

The offshore facility Mother Base supports your missions.

It houses staff living quarters, development labs for mission weapons and gear, storage for captured large-scale weapons, and more. Expanding your staff allows Mother Base to grow and develop, incorporating simulation elements.

----------
The Screenplay Book containing in-game text from Metal Gear Solid: Peace Walker and the Master Book detailing the story and characters are also included within the game.

70010000101704.description:
Welcome To Mars 9: The Tale Of River is a classic-style graphic adventure about a person adrift in space who is rescued by a luxurious space station orbiting Mars. Playing as River, you'll immerse yourself in a world of comfort and pleasure—until you realize the station hides a dark secret.

In Welcome To Mars 9: The Tale Of River, you'll navigate the station's lavish leisure facilities, using your wits to solve puzzles and move forward. As the story unfolds, you’ll begin to uncover the sinister side of the station and must choose whether to ignore it or take action.

The choices you make in Welcome To Mars 9: The Tale Of River will challenge your ethics and test your morality. Will you do whatever it takes to protect yourself and survive, or risk everything to expose the truth and stop what's happening on board?

The game's pixel art style creates a stunning, immersive world that captures the spirit of classic adventure games. From the luxurious amenities to the station’s shadowy corners, every location in Welcome To Mars 9: The Tale Of River is full of character and ready to be explored. Its gripping story will keep you on the edge of your seat. With multiple endings to discover, this is a game you'll want to replay.

Are you ready to embark on a journey of self-discovery and uncover the dark secrets of the space station orbiting Mars?
70010000101704.intro: Uncover the dark truth behind a luxury space station orbiting Mars.
70010000101704.name: Welcome To Mars 9: The Tale Of River

70010000115745.description:
Farming Camp is a cozy, single-player farm management game that follows the journey of an ambitious teenager competing to become the best farmer in the camp. Manage your farm alongside your companions, complete chores for points, and deal with the dynamics of a colorful cast in their teenage years. 

Your path to farming greatness begins!
Step into the boots of young Alessandra, before she became the renowned Evertree Farmer. Experience her life at the Evertree Farming Camp where it all began. Learn the ropes and face the fun and chaos of camp life.

Team up with a lively farming crew
You're not alone on the farm. You’ll have the company of two budding young farmers, each with their own vibe. Assign chores, solve problems, and build friendships as you figure out how to run the farm together.

Heart, humor, and harvests!
Farming’s only half the fun at Evertree Farming Camp. From delightful dramas to silly surprises, and even a few messy moments, there's never a dull day at the camp!

Work hard to take care of the camp
Use the tools at your disposal and climb your way to the top as the camp’s best farming team. Coordinate with your companions and earn points by completing chores, maintaining the camp, attending classes, and tackling missions.  

Have fun and win the competition
Jump into quick and fun minigames that keep things exciting—whether it’s racing against the clock to eliminate pests, chopping wood, cooking delicious meals, and more!

Key Features:
- Embark on a cozy single-player farming adventure and follow a unique, captivating story. 
- Explore a beautifully hand-drawn 2D top-down world full of charming details. 
- Meet a diverse and lovable cast of characters, each with their own quirks, stories, and farming talents. 
- Grow a variety of crops, care for animals, fish, and make your team win the competition.
- Keep your farm thriving with fun and engaging mini-games.
70010000115745.intro: Follow the journey of Alessandra competing to become the best farmer in the camp.
70010000115745.name: Farming Camp

70010000096681.description:
A vibrant sci-fi platform adventure game for the Nintendo Switch™, where you help Maxwell the dog explore unfamiliar worlds, make strange new friends and contend with mysterious forces - by jumping, shooting, slicing, shrinking, warping and drilling.

Maxwell’s homeworld is nearing collapse. In a last ditch-effort to find help, he hyperjumps where no dog has gone before. Stranded, he finds himself on the edge of a hostile system - if there’s any hope of return and rescue he’ll need every friend (and every weapon) he can find.

Forced to confront this celestial expanse head on, Maxwell stays strong - determined to keep his head up and lend a helping hand to everyone he meets on his journey. Like all underdogs, the odds are stacked against him, but you can’t keep a good dog down.

Key Features
· Explore jam-packed levels with multiple routes
· Make 50+ friends & collect their friendship cards
· Upgrade your blaster with special abilities
· Find hidden areas and take on a variety of boss battles
· Local couch co-op multiplayer mode
· Bonus prequel content: Chapter Zero
70010000096681.intro: Help Maxwell explore unfamiliar worlds, make strange new friends and contend with mysterious forces.
